subcodes.title: The Holy Spirit, the Intermediary Power between God and Man: Words spoken on 1911-10-31 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: The Divine Reality is Unthinkable, Limitless, Eternal, Immortal and Invisible. The world of creation is bound by natural law, finite and mortal.
subcodes.first_line_orig: حقیقت الوهیت در نهایت تنزیه و تقدیس است از برای حقیقت الوهیت نزول و صعودی
subcodes.subjects: @The Holy Spirit, @Manifestation of God as mediator, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @apostles; early disciples of Christ
